prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: HWK-TT-BRASSPENTORCH-8INCH Product Type: BLOWTORCH Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux Refillable Butane Pencil Torch, Hobbyist Craft Tools, 8 Inch Description: ToolTreaux's butane pencil torch with adjustable and precise flame control is an essential tool to keep in your toolbox. The pencil torch is highly versatile, compact, portable, easy to use and refill, and will reach up to temperatures of 1300 degrees Celsius or 2370 degrees Fahrenheit.

Multipurpose hobby tools are always a valuable addition to your arsenal of craft supplies, and this butane torch absolutely fits that bill; the torch can be used for detail soldering, welding, jewelry design and repair, culinary, cooking or baking finishing and presentation, electrical work and lastly, will melt small brazing rods, glass tubing as well as many other metal materials like silver, gold and copper and more.

In addition to its versatility, the ToolTreaux butane torch is easily refillable using a standard butane lighter canister (sold separately). And, the butane torch or pencil torch features an aluminum body and brass control valve, neck and tip; these are durable, reliable materials that make this versatile tool able to stand up to lots of wear and tear and see you through a myriad of creative projects.

Package includes refill instructions.

Butane and refill canister NOT included with purchase. Search Terms: lighter woodworking soldering iron portable pencil torch brass aluminum gold copper silver smelting jewelry repair hobbyist hobby tools arts and crafts creative design cooking baking culinary eletrical work electrician welding pewter lab supplies Features: - PORTABLE COMPACT BUTANE TORCH: ToolTreaux's butane pencil torch with adjustable and precise flame control is an essential tool to keep in your toolbox; it's highly versatile, cordless, compact, portable, easy to use and refill, and will reach up to temperatures of 1300 degrees Celsius or 2370 degrees Fahrenheit - CRAFT SUPPLIES ESSENTIAL: Multipurpose hobby tools are always a valuable addition to your arsenal of craft supplies! This butane torch can be used for soldering, jewelry design or repair, woodworking, culinary work, electrical and will melt many materials like silver, gold, tin, aluminum, copper and more - REFILLABLE BUTANE TORCH: Easy to maintain, refill and use on the go! The ToolTreaux pencil style butane torch is easily refillable using a standard butane lighter canister (sold separately) - BRASS AND ALUMINUM CONSTRUCTION: The butane torch or pencil torch features an aluminum body and brass control valve, neck and tip; these are durable, reliable materials that make this versatile tool able to stand up to lots of wear and tear - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 7.78 x 0.4 x 1 inches; Max Temp: 1300 C / 2370 F; Material: Brass, Aluminum; Package includes refill instructions; Butane not included with purchase === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 8 Inch Refillable Butane Pencil Torch

anthropic.title_differentiation: Adjustable Flame Control, 2370F Max Temp, Brass And Aluminum, Soldering, Jewelry, Culinary

openai.title_differentiation: Adjustable Flame Control, Brass And Aluminum Build, 1300C Max Temp, Refill With Standard Butane, Compact Portable
